question: How do I check my current data balance?
answer: Dial *123# from your mobile or log in to the MyTelecom app and go to My Usage. Your remaining data balance will be shown on the dashboard.

question: Why is my mobile internet so slow?
answer: Slow speeds are usually caused by network congestion in your area, being in a low-signal zone, or reaching your high-speed data cap. Try toggling airplane mode off and on to force a network reconnect. If your high-speed data is exhausted your speed is throttled to 512 kbps.

question: How do I activate 4G/LTE on my phone?
answer: Go to Settings > Mobile Network > Preferred Network Type and select 4G/LTE. Make sure your SIM supports 4G and your plan includes it. If the option is missing, contact support to check your account.

question: What should I do if I have no signal at home?
answer: First check our coverage map at telecom.example.com/coverage. If coverage is shown as good in your area try restarting your phone and reseating the SIM card. Persistent issues may require a network investigation - call 611.

question: How do I report a network outage?
answer: You can report an outage by calling 611, using the MyTelecom app under Help > Report an Issue, or tweeting @TelecomSupport. We will send an SMS once the outage is resolved.

question: My calls keep dropping. What should I do?
answer: Call drops are often caused by weak signal, SIM card faults, or a faulty device antenna. Try these steps: 1) Restart the phone 2) Reseat the SIM 3) Test with another SIM if possible 4) Check for network outages via the app.

question: How do I enable Wi-Fi calling?
answer: Go to Settings > Phone > Wi-Fi Calling and toggle it on. Wi-Fi calling lets you make and receive calls over a Wi-Fi network when cellular signal is weak. Your plan must include this feature; if not, call 611 to add it.

question: Why am I unable to make international calls?
answer: International calling must be enabled on your account. Log in to the portal, go to Add-ons > International Calling and activate it. Calls are billed at per-minute rates by country unless you have an international bundle.

question: How do I activate international roaming?
answer: Log in to MyTelecom > Plan & Services > International Roaming and toggle it on at least 24 hours before travel. Select a roaming bundle to avoid per-MB charges. Roaming is automatically disabled when you return home.

question: What are the roaming charges in the EU?
answer: Our EU Roaming Bundle costs $15/day and includes unlimited calls and texts within the EU plus 2 GB of data at local speeds. Without a bundle data is charged at $10/MB and calls at $1.50/minute.

question: How do I replace a lost or stolen SIM card?
answer: Report the loss by calling 611 immediately so we can block the SIM. Visit any store with a valid photo ID to get a replacement SIM. A fee of $5 applies. Your number and plan transfer to the new SIM automatically.

question: How long does SIM activation take?
answer: A new SIM card typically activates within 15 minutes of inserting it. If it has not activated after 1 hour restart the phone. If still inactive call 611 and quote your SIM serial number printed on the SIM card.
